calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 substrate-readiness 4-arm ablation (ALL_OFF / OPT1_ONLY / OPT2_ONLY / BOTH_ON)
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic for MECH-341 landing 2026-05-27. 4-arm ablation across master switch + sub-flavours (ALL_OFF / OPT1_ONLY entropy bonus / OPT2_ONLY stratified select / BOTH_ON). Reuses V3-EXQ-608 env config + metric stack so ARM_0 results are directly comparable to the EXQ-608 manifest. Acceptance: C1 substrate fires in ON arms (n_entropy_bonus_fired / n_stratified_fired > 0); C2 ARM_0 reproduces R2a_e3_collapse_confirmed_large_gap majority; C3 at least one of ARM_1/ARM_2 produces selected_classes_count >= 2 with frac_pre_ge2 >= 0.5; R2.c readiness: ARM_2 or ARM_3 clears selected_class_entropy threshold 0.3 nats. PASS routes governance to queue B_only / ablate_B / ALL_ON behavioural successor per behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; evidence_direction=non_contributory; not weighted in confidence/conflict scoring per Phase-3 governance rules.
